UW-49  NOZZLE-TO-SHELL AND NOZZLE-TO-HEAD WELDS. (a) The details of nozzle attachment welds shall conform to the acceptable types shown in this paragraph. (b) Full penetration welds are required for nozzles exceeding the size limits specified herein. Fillet welds shall meet the minimum dimensions of UW-35 and UW-16. (c) The reinforcement calculation of UG-37 shall account for the weld metal in the nozzle attachment zone per UG-40. Nozzle neck thickness shall comply with UG-44. Examination of nozzle welds shall be as required by UW-11. See also UW-15 for general joint design details.
